name: Bynum Community Center
description: Bynum Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Oxford, AL. There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Clyde H Pike Civic Center
description: Clyde H Pike Civic Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Piedmont, AL. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Friendship Community Center
description: Friendship Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Oxford, AL. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Jacksonville Community Center
description: Jacksonville Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jacksonville, AL. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The court is private.
hours: Monday to Thursday: 6 a.m. to 9 p.m. Friday: 6 a.m. to 6 p.m. Saturday: 6 a.m. to 5 p.m. Sunday: 1 p.m. to 5 p.m. Address 501A Alexandria Rd. name: JSU Recreation and Fitness Center
description: JSU Recreation and Fitness Center is a place to play pickleball in Jacksonville, AL. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are private.

name: Oxford Civic Center
description: Oxford Civic Center is a place to play pickleball in Ohatchee, AL. There are 8 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: Oxford Lake Dedicated Courts
description: Oxford Lake Dedicated Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Oxford, AL. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Oxford Lake Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at Oxford Lake Pickleball Courts in Oxford, AL! There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free. Reservations are not available.
open_play_schedule: Until further notice the courts close at 10 PM per the city of Oxford.

name: Parker Memorial Baptist Church
description: Parker Memorial Baptist Church is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Anniston, AL. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: YMCA Of Calhoun County
description: YMCA Of Calhoun County is a place to play pickleball in Anniston, AL. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available.
